overview: Food Gardens is a black-green aggro deck built for the Pauper format that leverages highly efficient one-mana spells to disrupt opponents while applying immediate pressure. By cycling cheap creatures and utilizing targeted board interaction, the deck aims to close out games before opponents can establish a stable board state. The synergy between instant-speed buffs and sacrifice-based removal creates a dynamic, hard-to-answer game plan.
win_conditions: Overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of cheap creatures boosted by instant-speed buffs
Using sacrifice-based removal to bypass blockers and swing for lethal
Generating card advantage through targeted interaction to outlast aggressive matchups

keep_criteria: Hands containing at least two one-mana spells
Early land drops paired with a creature or interaction
Combinations that enable turn-one or turn-two pressure
mulligan_criteria: Hands with three or more lands
Lack of one-mana spells or early creatures
Hands reliant solely on high-cost cards

early_game: Prioritize land drops and play cheap creatures to establish immediate board presence
Use one-mana interaction to disrupt opponent's early threats or clear paths for attackers
Hold up mana when necessary to respond to opponent's plays
mid_game: Leverage sacrifice outlets to remove problematic blockers or finish off damaged creatures
Apply consistent pressure with buffed attackers while maintaining card advantage
Adapt playstyle based on opponent's board state, swinging hard when clear or trading efficiently
late_game: Rely on card draw from interaction spells to maintain resources
Use remaining mana to push for lethal with optimized creature stats
Avoid overextending into board wipes by keeping a hand of interaction

key_cards.name: Fanatical Offering
key_cards.notes: Use to eliminate blockers or finish off damaged creatures, ensuring your attackers can swing freely

key_cards.name: Lembas
key_cards.notes: Cast before attacking to maximize damage output and push lethal faster

key_cards.name: Eviscerator's Insight
key_cards.notes: Hold up mana to respond to threats, then draw a card to maintain resource parity

sequencing_tips: Hold up black mana to keep Eviscerator's Insight available for instant-speed responses
Time Fanatical Offering to coincide with a sacrificial creature or when you need to clear a specific blocker
Play Lembas immediately before declaring attackers to maximize combat damage
Prioritize land drops early to ensure consistent access to one-mana spells

matchups.advice: Use instant-speed interaction to disrupt their early board state and buy time for your own threats to develop
Apply relentless pressure to prevent them from stabilizing, using card advantage to outlast their removal
Trade efficiently with sacrifice-based removal and maintain board presence with buffed creatures
